---
title: "cell_quality_cb"
author: "Valerio Reffo"
date: "2026-04-16"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```



```{r}
#devtools::install_github("powellgenomicslab/DropletQC", build_vignettes = FALSE)
library(DropletQC)
```

```{r}
nf <- nuclear_fraction_annotation(
  annotation_path = "~/ref/refdata-cellranger-hg19-3.0.0/genes/genes.gtf", 
  bam = "~/cite_seq_coord_blood_raw_data/SRR5808750/STARsolo_output/Aligned.sortedByCoord.out.bam",
  barcodes = "~/cite_seq_coord_blood_raw_data/SRR5808750/STARsolo_output/Solo.out/Gene/raw/barcodes.tsv",
  tiles = 1, 
  cores = 4, 
  verbose = TRUE
)
```

```{r}
class(nf)
str(nf)
summary(nf$nuclear_fraction)
```
